title: Link
description: A storage mod for StationAPI (b1.7.3) that has a tiered storage progression
body:
## Link
Link is a storage mod for StationAPI, a Beta 1.7.3 modloader based on Babric, which is Fabric ported to Beta 1.7.3. The mod features tiered storage that evolves with you as you play through your world. Currently, only the first tier is available, the Link Terminal, which displays the chests that are connected to it and gives you a shortcut to them.
